statements.select: select rtrim(ltrim(str(cityid))) as city, a.title as cityname, rtrim(ltrim(str(zipcode))) as zipcode, rtrim(ltrim(b.title)) zipname from city a join region b on a.id=b.cityid order by city, zipcode

select '21' as CODE, '【D1】工作價值與工作願景' as TEXT union select '22' as CODE, '【D2】群我倫理與績效表現' as TEXT union select '23' as CODE, '【D3】專業精神與自我管理' as TEXT union select '11' as CODE, '【B1】職場與職務之認知與溝通協調' as TEXT union select '12' as CODE, '【B2】工作團隊與團隊協作' as TEXT union select '13' as CODE, '【B3】職場夥伴關係與衝突管理' as TEXT union select '31' as CODE, '【K1】職場環境的學習與創新' as TEXT union select '32' as CODE, '【K2】價值概念與成本意識' as TEXT union select '33' as CODE, '【K3】問題反映與分析解決' as TEXT
select rtrim(ltrim(str(id))) as CODE, title as TEXT from city order by id
select '1' CODE, '工會' TEXT union select '2' CODE, '協會' TEXT union select '3' CODE, '管顧' TEXT union select '4' CODE, '顧問' TEXT
select '1' as CODE, '國中小' as TEXT union select '2', '高中職' union select '3', '學士' union select '4', '碩士' union select '5', '博士'
select '1' as CODE, '北區' as TEXT union select '2', '桃園區' union select '3', '中區' union select '4', '台南區' union select '5', '南區' union select '6', '個人師資'
select '1' as CODE, '產業界' as TEXT union select '2', '學術界-講師' union select '3', '學術界-助理教授' union select '4', '學術界-副教授' union select '5', '學術界-教授'
SELECT rtrim(ltrim(str(id))) as CODE, (case when mclass='1' then '製造業-' + name when mclass='2' then '服務業-' + name when mclass='3' then '其它-' + name end ) AS TEXT FROM indsclass
select '1' as CODE, '企業人力資源提升計畫' as TEXT union select '2', '小型企業人力提升計畫' union select '3', '大專就業學程' union select '4', '產業人才投資方案' union select '5', '失業者職前訓練'
select '1' as CODE, '訓練單位' as TEXT union select '2', '職訓機構' union select '3', '學校' union select '4', '企業' union select '5', '其他'
select 'mairian9988@yahoo.com.tw' as email union select 'attsai@tcfst.org.tw' union select 'AdminAdmin'
